scripts.lighthouse:mobile: npm run lighthouse:prepare && start-server-and-test "next start -p 4173" http://localhost:4173 "lighthouse http://localhost:4173 --quiet --chrome-flags=\"--headless --no-sandbox --disable-dev-shm-usage --user-data-dir=.lighthouse/chrome-mobile\" --output=json --output-path=./.lighthouse/mobile.json"
scripts.lighthouse:desktop: npm run lighthouse:prepare && start-server-and-test "next start -p 4173" http://localhost:4173 "lighthouse http://localhost:4173 --preset=desktop --quiet --chrome-flags=\"--headless --no-sandbox --disable-dev-shm-usage --user-data-dir=.lighthouse/chrome-desktop\" --output=json --output-path=./.lighthouse/desktop.json"
scripts.perf:audit: npm run build && npm run lighthouse:mobile && npm run lighthouse:desktop && node scripts/lighthouse-summary.mjs
